description: T658 ShapeHeuristicAnalyzer MUST validate board ownership via fabric at ORDER 1. Cross-tenant board access forbidden. Board metadata read from fabric, workspace confirmed matches boardId.
blockConditions: T658 processes shapes without board ownership validation
Board validation not at ORDER 1 before shape processing
boardId sourced from request parameter instead of fabric
passConditions: Workspace validation confirms APIKey matches boardId

description: T658 ShapeHeuristicAnalyzer MUST infer shape type via heuristics when explicit type missing. Aspect ratio rules: if aspectRatio > 2.0 then LINE (conf 0.92), if < 0.3 then COLUMN (conf 0.88). Confidence score stored with inferred type. Unknown types return ShapeTypeNotSupported.
blockConditions: Shape type heuristics not applied when type missing
Aspect ratio calculation incorrect or missing
Confidence score not recorded with inferred type

description: T658 ShapeHeuristicAnalyzer MUST emit ShapeTypeInferred CloudEvent with shapeId, inferred type, confidence score, boardId. Emit ShapeTypeNotSupported event for unsupported types.
blockConditions: Shape type event not emitted on successful inference
Event missing confidence score or inferred type
Unsupported type event absent
passConditions: ShapeTypeInferred emitted with type, confidence, shapeId

description: T658 ShapeHeuristicAnalyzer MUST validate boardId ownership via fabric at ORDER 1. Cross-tenant board access forbidden. tenantId from AsyncLocalStorage only — never from request.
blockConditions: T658 processes board from other tenant
Board ownership not validated against ALS tenantId
tenantId sourced from request parameter
passConditions: Board ownership validated via fabric at ORDER 1
Cross-tenant access rejected with authorization error

description: T658 ShapeHeuristicAnalyzer MUST store shape heuristic analysis in xiigen-shape-heuristics index with knowledgeScope=PRIVATE before emitting events. Record includes shapeId, boardId, originalType, inferredType, confidence, heuristicRules applied.
blockConditions: Heuristic analysis not stored before event emission
knowledgeScope not PRIVATE in xiigen-shape-heuristics
Confidence score or heuristic rules missing from record
passConditions: knowledgeScope: PRIVATE set on heuristic record

description: T658 ShapeHeuristicAnalyzer implementation requires: (1) Fabric board ownership validation, (2) Shape heuristic inference archetype (aspect-ratio rules), (3) Confidence scoring, (4) Unsupported element audit, (5) CloudEvents emission, (6) Outbox pattern. Transfer heuristic pattern from FLOW-29 (Adaptive RAG).
blockConditions: Fabric validation not implemented
Heuristic rules hardcoded or missing
Audit trail for unsupported shapes absent
passConditions: T658 uses fabric for board validation

description: T658 ShapeHeuristicAnalyzer generation prompt MUST include: (1) Board ownership validation via fabric at ORDER 1, (2) Shape type heuristics (aspect-ratio based), (3) Confidence scoring, (4) Unsupported type handling + audit, (5) CloudEvents emission, (6) Outbox pattern. Reference FLOW-29 heuristic pattern.
blockConditions: Prompt missing fabric validation
Heuristic rules not specified
Audit handling missing
passConditions: Prompt specifies board validation at ORDER 1

description: T658 ShapeHeuristicAnalyzer: xiigen-shape-heuristics index is PRIVATE scope. Cross-tenant shape analysis forbidden. Tenant context from AsyncLocalStorage only — never from event payload.
